'''''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Battleground: Tatooine''''' was the third story-arc in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' comics. It ran from [[July 1]] to [[September 1]], [[1996]].
